broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Replace javax.jms imports with jakarta.jms to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required for modern Spring Boot versions.
Refactor instanceof check to use Java 16+ pattern matching to eliminate explicit casting.
Remove unused import for Initializable interface to clean up code.
Remove unused import for java.io.InputStreamReader to clean up the code.
Remove unused import for org.apache.commons.configuration2.XMLConfiguration to clean up the code.
Change log level from debug to info for user config loading to improve visibility.
Pass the class reference to LogManager.getLogger to ensure correct logger naming and MDC context.
Make the Spring ApplicationContext static and provide a getter to allow external access and simplify lifecycle management.
broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.human_impl: private static AbstractApplicationContext context; public static AbstractApplicationContext getApplicationContext()

broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Add a new command-line option to allow specifying a suffix for log files.
Implement the logic to read the log-suffix option and append it to the generated log file names.
Simplify the application context refresh logic by relying on the new static getter and removing redundant null checks.
Migrate JMS and annotation imports from javax.* to jakarta.* to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by modern Spring Boot versions.
Replace traditional instanceof checks with pattern matching instanceof to simplify type casting logic.
Migrate JMS imports from javax.jms to jakarta.jms to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required for modern application servers and Spring Boot 3.
Replace the import of org.joda.time.Instant with java.time.Instant to migrate from Joda-Time to Java Time API.
Update Instant arithmetic to use java.time.Instant.plusMillis() instead of Joda-Time's plus(long) method.
Replace Joda-Time Instant.getMillis() with java.time.Instant.toEpochMilli() for extracting epoch milliseconds.
Move DomainRepo recycling logic to occur after time service initialization to ensure correct state during bootstrap.
Add a comment questioning the order of property addition.
broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.human_impl: propertiesService.addProperties(cli);  // are these in the correct order?

broker-core/src/main/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Replace the deprecated Joda-Time Instant import with the standard Java 8+ java.time.Instant to align with the Java 21 migration.

broker-core/src/test/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Replace Joda-Time imports with Java 8+ java.time equivalents to align with the Java 21 migration.
broker-core/src/test/java/org/powertac/s.human_impl: import java.time.Instant; import java.time.ZoneOffset; import java.time.ZonedDateTime;

broker-core/src/test/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Update base time initialization from Joda DateTime to Java ZonedDateTime to maintain UTC timezone handling.
Replace Joda Instant.getMillis() with Java Instant.toEpochMilli() for compatibility with the new time API.
Replace verbose Joda DateTime creation for current time with concise Java Instant.now().toEpochMilli().
Migrate JMS imports from javax.jms to jakarta.jms to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by the target environment.
Replace Joda-Time imports with Java 8+ java.time equivalents to remove external dependency.
broker-core/src/test/java/org/powertac/s.human_impl: import java.time.Instant; import java.time.ZoneOffset; import java.time.ZonedDateTime;

broker-core/src/test/java/org/powertac/s.general_idea: Replace Joda DateTime construction with ZonedDateTime for base time initialization.
Replace Joda DateTime.now() with Instant.now() for current time retrieval.
Replace Joda Instant.getMillis() with Instant.toEpochMilli() for millisecond extraction.
Replace Joda Instant.plus(long) with Instant.plusMillis(long) for time arithmetic.

common/src/main/java/org/powertac/common.general_idea: Remove a deprecated getter method that was previously marked for removal.
common/src/main/java/org/powertac/common.human_impl: Commented out the @Deprecated getQuantity() method and its body.

common/src/main/java/org/powertac/common.general_idea: Replace the Joda-Time Instant import with the standard Java 8+ java.time.Instant to migrate away from the deprecated third-party library.
